calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Continued To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martha Bridegam for Genevieve Middleton.

Ms. Bridegam stated that there are some tax complications and that the Administrator has until November to pay the Franchise Tax Board for an issue with the 2010 tax year. Ms. Bridegam also stated that the private debts have been previously resolved and that they have a final distribution petition that her office is attempting to file today. Status on close of estate is continued to November 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
